overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a nighttime walk through a neon-lit cyberpunk alleyway. The player descends from an elevated walkway adorned with red paper lanterns, passes various storefronts with bright neon signage, and navigates through a dense urban environment with other NPCs present.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with hanging red lanterns

agents.ego_description: moving steadily along an elevated concrete walkway lined with glowing red paper lanterns

entered.detail: series of large glowing red spherical paper lanterns hanging overhead along the walkway
narrow elevated pedestrian walkway with concrete flooring and metal railings
metal safety barrier along the edge of the elevated walkway
various colorful neon signs visible in the distance down the alley

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated concrete walkway at night, illuminated by hanging red paper lanterns. The camera moves forward along this narrow enclosed passage, with metal railings visible on the sides and neon glow emanating from signs further down the alley.

scene_state.functional_zone: descent ramp into neon-lit commercial alley

events.description: begins descending from elevated walkway down to street level via concrete ramp
transitions from level walking to descending motion while maintaining forward momentum

agents.ego_description: descending from the elevated walkway down to street level while moving forward through the alley

entered.detail: large rectangular neon sign with 'RED ROOM' text in pink/red lighting
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
overhead awning made of corrugated metal with pink neon lighting underneath

segments.scene_description: The camera descends from the elevated walkway down to street level via a concrete ramp. The 'RED ROOM' neon sign becomes prominent on the left, while the right side features graffiti-covered walls and corrugated metal awnings with pink neon lighting. The environment transitions from the lantern-lit walkway to a grittier street-level alley.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with adult entertainment venues

events.description: passes by the red-haired character standing near the neon-lit storefront

agents.ego_description: walking along the street-level alley, approaching and passing a stationary character with red hair

notable_agents.action: character with bright red hair standing with arms crossed near a pink neon storefront, wearing a blue and white outfit

entered.detail: green neon sign reading 'ESOTERICA' mounted on brick wall
large vertical billboard with 'XXXV' and 'Barely Legal' text in neon
blue neon hotel sign with Japanese characters 'ホテル' and English 'HOTEL'
storefront with intense pink/magenta neon vertical lighting strips

segments.scene_description: At street level, the camera moves past various commercial storefronts including 'ESOTERICA' and an adult entertainment venue with 'XXXV' signage. A character with distinctive red hair stands near a pink neon storefront on the right. The environment features dense neon signage including a blue Japanese hotel sign, with other NPCs visible in the background near the graffiti-covered walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with food vendor stalls

events.description: enters narrower passage with food vendor stalls and steam effects

agents.ego_description: continuing down the narrowing alley toward a vendor area, passing by distant NPCs

notable_agents.action: figure standing near the vendor stall at the end of the alley

entered.detail: small food vendor stall with warm yellow lighting and steam rising from cooking equipment
constricted alleyway with walls close on both sides leading deeper into the district
atmospheric steam and smoke effects floating through the alley

segments.scene_description: The alley narrows as the camera moves deeper into the district, passing the main commercial area. A food vendor stall with warm lighting appears on the right, emitting steam that adds atmospheric haze. The environment becomes more enclosed with the hotel sign now visible in the distance, and the passage ahead grows darker and more confined.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person descent from a lantern-lit elevated walkway into the dense, neon-saturated depths of a gritty urban alley. It begins moving forward along a narrow concrete passage adorned with hanging red paper lanterns and metal railings, before gliding down a ramp toward street level. As the camera descends, the atmosphere shifts from the soft glow of lanterns to a harsher industrial aesthetic, passing the prominent RED ROOM sign and graffiti-covered walls illuminated by pink neon. The scene then expands into a commercial corridor filled with bright signage for Esoterica and a blue Japanese hotel, moving past various NPCs and a red-haired character. Finally, the environment narrows and grows more confined as the camera passes a steaming food vendor stall, drifting away from the bright storefronts into a darker, hazier stretch of the district.
